title: APK (Alpine Linux) and BSD (FreeBSD) Platform Support
description: Add comprehensive package definitions for Alpine Linux (apk) and FreeBSD (pkg) across all Jarvy tools
acceptance_criteria: All tools have either BSD package defined OR documented as N/A
All tools using uniform: automatically have APK support
_template.rs includes BSD placeholder for new tools
Code compiles successfully with cargo check --all-features
New brew + apk macro pattern available for hybrid Linux support

tasks.title: Implement BsdInstall infrastructure
tasks.description: Create BsdInstall struct and BSD package manager detection
subtasks: Create BsdInstall struct in spec.rs (lines 176-188)
Implement pkg() helper method
Add detect_bsd_pm() in common.rs (lines 239-254)
Implement install_bsd() method in spec.rs (lines 443-459)

tasks.title: Implement APK infrastructure
tasks.description: Add APK field to LinuxInstall and update uniform() helper
subtasks: Add apk field to LinuxInstall struct (line 91)
Update uniform() helper to include APK (line 103)
Ensure existing tools using uniform: get automatic APK support

tasks.title: Add brew + apk macro pattern
tasks.description: Create new macro pattern for tools with Alpine packages but not other distro packages
subtasks: Design brew + apk pattern in define_tool! macro (lines 560-571)
Document pattern usage for tool authors

tasks.title: Add BSD support to all applicable tools
subtasks: Add BSD package to uniform Linux tools (70 tools)
Add BSD package to explicit apt/dnf/pacman tools (41 tools)
Add BSD package to Linuxbrew + APK tools (10 tools)
Add BSD package to Linuxbrew-only tools (29 tools)
Document GUI/Desktop apps as N/A (7 tools)
Document custom install tools as N/A (3 tools)

tasks.title: Research and add APK packages
tasks.description: Research Alpine packages for tools and add explicit apk definitions
subtasks: Research Alpine packages at pkgs.alpinelinux.org
Add explicit apk for 10 tools: argocd, cosign, dive, grype, krew, lazydocker, nerdctl, ruff, syft, trivy
Document unavailable tools (29 Linuxbrew-only tools)

tasks.title: Update tool template
tasks.description: Update _template.rs to include BSD placeholder for new tools
subtasks: Add BSD placeholder to define_tool! template
Add comment documenting when to omit BSD

tasks.title: Verification and testing
tasks.description: Verify implementation compiles and works correctly
subtasks: Run cargo check --all-features
Run cargo fmt --all
Verify no compilation errors

future_testing: Alpine Docker: Build in alpine:edge container
FreeBSD CI: Cirrus CI with FreeBSD image
